headline: LASIK Eye Surgery in Chennai
subheadline: AIIMS-trained ophthalmologist Dr. Rajeswari offers safe, evidence-based LASIK evaluation and treatment in KK Nagar, Chennai.
metaDescription: LASIK eye surgery consultation in KK Nagar, Chennai with Dr. Rajeswari. Honest evaluation, no unnecessary procedures. Call or book online.

whyPatientsChoose.title: Honest Suitability Assessment
whyPatientsChoose.description: We tell you clearly if LASIK is right for you -- and what to consider if it isn't.

symptoms: Dependent on glasses or contact lenses

processSteps.title: Comprehensive Evaluation
processSteps.description: Detailed corneal mapping to confirm you're a safe candidate.

processSteps.title: Honest Discussion
processSteps.description: A clear conversation about your results and whether LASIK is truly right for you.

processSteps.title: The Procedure
processSteps.description: If suitable, the laser procedure takes only minutes per eye.
